programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Living together for the first time, half-siblings Jack and Lily are pushed outside their comfort zones as they learn to coexist while navigating new family dynamics, friends, and endless hijinks all while helping run the familys pet grooming and boarding business. With guidance from their parents and grandmother, the two will learn about each others previously separate lives, blended identity, vibrant culture, and the importance of family.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: With only a few weeks left of summer, Lil has a genius idea: the family must visit her favorite theme park, Lake World, before Jack leaves! But when they arrive, its clearly less magical than Lil remembered: the fish dogs are droopy, the coaster aint coastin, the all-you-can-eat shrimp buffet is kaput. Jacks more interested in filming the janky park - frustrating Lil, who wants him to enjoy the day with his eyeballs. She consoles herself that the parks BEST ride will make up for the disappointing day. But when they get to where the ride should be, its gone! Devastated, Lil blames Jack for the horrid day, and they get in a bad fight. Back at the hotel that night, still mad at each other, the kids cant help but piece together clues hinting that the Otter Side might still be in the park... They have to find it! The kids must sneak past vengeful security guards and chaotic mazes to find the mythical ride, leading to an adventure neither of them expected.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Deep down in the Pacific Ocean in the subterranean city of Bikini Bottom lives a square yellow sponge named SpongeBob SquarePants. SpongeBob lives in a pineapple with his pet snail, Gary, loves his job as a fry cook at the Krusty Krab, and has a knack for getting into all kinds of trouble without really trying. When hes not getting on the nerves of his cranky next door neighbor Squidward, SpongeBob can usually be found smack in the middle of all sorts of strange situations with his best buddy, the simple yet lovable starfish, Patrick, or his thrill-seeking surfer-girl squirrel pal, Sandy Cheeks.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: After reading a book by the Twins parents, Bibi learns about Marsupilamis and decides she wants one. The Twins deny Marsupilamis exist, but Bibis convinced they have their own, so starts spying on them. Jade claims a tail that Bibi spots is just a hose, but Bibi wants proof. So Mica sends the Marsupilamis to fetch one-they try to steal Rosas hose but it ends up getting lost, and whilst hunting for it Twister mistakes a Jaguars tail for the hose. The Jaguar then follows them back home where they manage to trap it in their nest, where Bibi encounters it thinking its a Marsup! Scared she declares shes sticking to Puppies in the future. // Lunch service at the school canteen is slow and Jade leads a chant to speed up the service. With the help of the Marsups the old chef returns, and is so appalled by the food that she reclaims her job.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max unwittingly let Chloes friends watch a horror movie and eat candy, leaving them traumatized and craving more sugar. Jinx and Boochs parents want to meet with Chloes parents to discuss the lack of supervision at the beach house. With Hank and Barb away, Max and Phoebe are determined to prove they can be good guardians, and use a disguise gadget to transform into their parents to help Chloe. It goes well until the real Hank and Barb show up, and must transform into Max and Phoebe to keep the ruse going.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: On their way back from Lake World, the Wylde Paks get stuck in a massive traffic jam. The situation gets so dire that all the drivers have no choice but to set up camp - a camp that quickly turns into its own, self-governing, rudimentary society. Struggling with a vacuum of power, Jack is chosen as their reluctant leader, but hes determined to usher them into peace. Meanwhile, Lily catches feelings for a boy in a nearby car, but because the boys dad and Will have serious road rage beef, their romance is forbidden. // Desperate to leave their mark on Canyon Valley, Jack and Lily set out to capture the great beast of Canyon Valley Lake - a giant fish that has menaced the town for years. programme.desc: iCarly is about teenager Carly who produces her own web show named iCarly along with her three friends Freddie, Sam and Gibby. The show is broadcasted from a studio Carly constructed in the flat where she lives with her 29 years old brother and guardian Spencer. While producing a webshow Carly is not looking for fame or fortune. Ideally she wants to be a role model for children and teenagers. iCarly ultimately features everything from comedy sketches and talent contests to interviews, recipes, and problem-solving.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Victorious tells the story of the sixteen year old Tori Vega. She grows up in the shadow of her older sister Trina, the big star of the family. But this suddenly changes as Tori attends Hollywood Arts, the best high school of performing arts. Soon she finds out that it is difficult to find her way and be accepted by her fellow students. While Tori is a great singer, dancer and actress, she doesnt realise it. Gradually she finds out that she is a true entertainer and very talented.

programme.title: Sam and Cat
programme.desc: Prepare to meet the strangest match made in bestie heaven -- Sam and Cat! Sams loud, independent, and tough as nails, while Cat is sweet as pie and super flighty. But that doesnt stop this unlikely pair from becoming best buds and roomies! Together, theyre a power duo with a love for fun and adventure -- its just too bad that it doesnt come cheap. A booming out-of-home babysitting business quickly becomes the answer to their empty-pocket problems, but also an extra reason for countless wacky adventures to come!

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leo, Raph, Donnie and Mikey emerge from the sewers to face challenges alongside April ONeil like never before. When trouble oozes into the streets of New York City, the team finds themselves up against Mechazoids, street gangs, and even the storm of the century! No matter the obstacle, these heroes in a half shell are ready for action with heart and a whole lot of humor.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: After reading a book by the Twins parents, Bibi learns about Marsupilamis and decides she wants one. The Jaguar then follows them back home where they manage to trap it in their nest, where Bibi encounters it thinking its a Marsup! With the help of the Marsups the old chef returns, and is so appalled by the food that she reclaims her job.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester are a pair of hilariously individual twins who live in a weird and wonderful alternate reality where your neighbour could be a pair of disgruntled trousers or your best friend a floating cloud of bottom burp. But, unlike their friends and neighbours, Best and Bester have the unique ability to choose a new body every single day and, in doing so, experience life in a completely different way.

programme.title: Henry Danger

Brave Henry must hide his job from his family and friends and it is not that simple, but nothing can stop him from being a true crime-fighter. Henry himself wants to become a super hero one day, that is why he is constantly learning from Captain Man and is not scared of any hardships on the way to his dream.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: In this crowded and chaotic household, Lincoln Loud is the only boy among his ten sisters. With eleven children under one roof, things get a little bit crazy sometimes, to say the least. This childrens cartoon is fun and light-hearted, and Clyde, Lincolns best friend, only adds to that. Clyde is an only child by contrast, and is jealous of Lincolns abundance of siblings. Clyde also has a massive crush on Lori, who is Lincolns oldest sister. However, she has a boyfriend, Bobby. Bobby, although not being particularly intelligent, has several different jobs, ranging from life guard, to security at a shopping centre.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: On their way back from Lake World, the Wylde Paks get stuck in a massive traffic jam. The situation gets so dire that all the drivers have no choice but to set up camp - a camp that quickly turns into its own, self-governing, rudimentary society. Struggling with a vacuum of power, Jack is chosen as their reluctant leader, but hes determined to usher them into peace. Meanwhile, Lily catches feelings for a boy in a nearby car, but because the boys dad and Will have serious road rage beef, their romance is forbidden. // Desperate to leave their mark on Canyon Valley, Jack and Lily set out to capture the great beast of Canyon Valley Lake - a giant fish that has menaced the town for years. After being swallowed whole multiple times, Lily and Jack realize they must take a different approach, but then they hear horror stories from other townsfolk about their own run-ins with the giant fish proving that bagging the beast is an impossible task. Despite all this, Lily and Jack attempt to accomplish the impossible.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: When Jack finally gets a phone, his first text (a joke about Will) goes to the family group chat instead of Lily! This forces the kids to follow their dad through town without him knowing, in an attempt to delete the message before he has a chance to read it, and puts them in situations so awkward and uncomfortable that Jack will forever think twice before hitting "send" again. // The family discovers there is one more precious hallasand cookie left and agree to share it, but before they can, it suddenly goes missing. All fingers point to Halmoni, and the family calls an emergency family tribunal to prove her guilt or her innocence. SpongeBob lives in a pineapple with his pet snail, Gary, loves his job as a fry cook at the Krusty Krab, and has a knack for getting into all kinds of trouble without really trying. When hes not getting on the nerves of his cranky next door neighbor Squidward, SpongeBob can usually be found smack in the middle of all sorts of strange situations with his best buddy, the simple yet lovable starfish, Patrick, or his thrill-seeking surfer-girl squirrel pal, Sandy Cheeks.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: Phone avatar Lay Lay is the perfect hype girl and best friend that anyone could ever want from their personal affirmation app. Struggling to make her mark at school and needing a best friend to talk to, Sadie wishes upon a star that Lay Lay was real and could help teach her how to stand out. When her wish comes true and Lay Lay is magically brought to life, the two friends learn that when they are together, they can accomplish anything.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Max appears to have willingly switched to the villains side, prompting President Kickbutt to assign Captain Perfect as Phoebes new superhero partner. Max quickly gains the villains trust and leads Kiefer and the other henchmen to his house to fight Phoebe and Captain Perfect. During the fight, Max and Kiefer capture Phoebe and Captain Perfect. Max reveals he was never really evil, but was only pretending to gain access to the Chip-Chucker. Max and Phoebe defeat Kiefer and the henchmen, and they discover that the Chip-Chucker contains technology that leads them to the identitly of the Mastermind, who is revealed to be Lazlo Chance, B.C.s father. Chloe is anxious about going to the dance with B.C. and keeps trying to avoid him whenever a slow song comes on. Seeking help from Phoebe, she hides in the photo booth to teleport home. However, Jinx and Booch find a photo of her mid-teleport (they cannot see who did the teleporting), leading them to believe theres a superhero among them.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry Danger is a story about adventures of a 13-year-old Henry Hart who is lucky to become a helpmate of a super hero Captain Man. This is a real dream job of every teen. The newbie is getting paid for fighting against crime and helping to save the world. Brave Henry must hide his job from his family and friends and it is not that simple, but nothing can stop him from being a true crime-fighter. Henry himself wants to become a super hero one day, that is why he is constantly learning from Captain Man and is not scared of any hardships on the way to his dream.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iCarly is about teenager Carly who produces her own web show named iCarly along with her three friends Freddie, Sam and Gibby. The show is broadcasted from a studio Carly constructed in the flat where she lives with her 29 years old brother and guardian Spencer. While producing a webshow Carly is not looking for fame or fortune. Ideally she wants to be a role model for children and teenagers. iCarly ultimately features everything from comedy sketches and talent contests to interviews, recipes, and problem-solving.

programme.title: Sam and Cat
programme.desc: Prepare to meet the strangest match made in bestie heaven -- Sam and Cat! Sams loud, independent, and tough as nails, while Cat is sweet as pie and super flighty. But that doesnt stop this unlikely pair from becoming best buds and roomies! Together, theyre a power duo with a love for fun and adventure -- its just too bad that it doesnt come cheap. A booming out-of-home babysitting business quickly becomes the answer to their empty-pocket problems, but also an extra reason for countless wacky adventures to come!

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: In this crowded and chaotic household, Lincoln Loud is the only boy among his ten sisters. With eleven children under one roof, things get a little bit crazy sometimes, to say the least. This childrens cartoon is fun and light-hearted, and Clyde, Lincolns best friend, only adds to that. Clyde is an only child by contrast, and is jealous of Lincolns abundance of siblings. Clyde also has a massive crush on Lori, who is Lincolns oldest sister. However, she has a boyfriend, Bobby. Bobby, although not being particularly intelligent, has several different jobs, ranging from life guard, to security at a shopping centre.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: Family-orientated cartoon for kids. Ronnie Anne Santiago, her big brother Bobby and their mum have recently moved to Great Lakes City and are now getting used to life in this busy, and sometimes chaotic, new town. Here in the big city they meet the Casagrandes – their extended family made up of grandparents, aunt, uncle, cousins and their pets. Along with a bunch of friends they all live as one big happy family. Skateboarding Ronnie Anne also starts to explore what their new hometown has to offer. Meanwhile, Bobby helps his grandfather Hector working in the family store where they meet lots of interesting characters from the neighbourhood.

programme.desc: The Fairly OddParents tells us a story of Timmy Turner, a 10-year-old boy in the fictional town of Dimmsdale. Vicky is his babysitter with vicious temper. His parents are completely indifferent to him. His life is very sad and hopeless until his fairy godparents Wanda and Cosmo apperar in the fishbowl and try to fulfill his every wish. Timmys greenness in making his wishes causes troubles and he has to "unwish" them together with his fairy godparents to avoid possible disasters. Enjoy Timmys fantastic adventures in the world of fairies, dragons, unicorns and dwarfs.

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: The epic battle continues. Grim Big proves a devastating weapon and Sonic finds himself on the ropes until he receives help from Shadow! Even after Sonic and friends rally, Nines power proves too great. Finally, Sonic cooks up a bold plan and fails.

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: Sonic confronts Nine atop the Citadel and tries to convince him to save the Shatterverse. Nine refuses to listen, blinded by fury. When Nine focuses all his might on Sonic, Sonics trap is sprung! The endgame is at hand.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: In this crowded and chaotic household, Lincoln Loud is the only boy among his ten sisters. With eleven children under one roof, things get a little bit crazy sometimes, to say the least. This childrens cartoon is fun and light-hearted, and Clyde, Lincolns best friend, only adds to that. Clyde is an only child by contrast, and is jealous of Lincolns abundance of siblings. Clyde also has a massive crush on Lori, who is Lincolns oldest sister. However, she has a boyfriend, Bobby. Bobby, although not being particularly intelligent, has several different jobs, ranging from life guard, to security at a shopping centre.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish
programme.desc: On a fairy family trip to Fairy World, Dev convinces Hazel to steal Peris wand and explore Fairy World. Cosmo, Wanda and Peri sneak into Jorgens office and use his tracker to find them. Hazel and Dev end up stuck in the Un-Wish Zone, trapped by the Un-wish Dragon. Together they must battle the dragon and find their way back to their fairies before Jorgen finds out! // When band and orchestra tryouts happen at school, Hazel finds herself stuck in the middle of a rivalry between the two. Rather than choose a side, she wishes to be good at all instruments and ends up in both. Exhausted from the double life shes living, she wishes that the band and orchestra had nothing to be rivals about. In granting the wish, Cosmo and Wanda get rid of all music on Earth. Hazel, with the help of the Nmusic Phairy (silent N), must restore music to Earth and end this rivalry once and for all!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish
programme.desc: During a visit from Antony, Hazels wish lands them inside "Rattleconda Racers," a board game they invented. Once in the game, however, they bicker about the best way to play. Hazel wants to stick to the rules they used to play by, but Antony wants to make new ones. When the formidable Rhonda the Rattleconda takes off with Cosmo and Wanda, intending to make them her next meal, Hazel and Antony must confront the tension in their relationship to save them and escape the game! // When Hazel must give a presentation on what she wants to be when she grows up, she is excited to share her dreams of being a geologist! Wanting to wow her classmates, she wishes she could excavate an "out of this world" rock to show them. Cosmo and Wanda poof her underground to find a super special rock, and she does! But in the process, she angers a group of rock monsters and must use her knowledge of geology to win them over, get her rock back, and escape the cave!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish
programme.desc: Dev is bummed at his own birthday party because his dad is off working. Hazel tries to cheer him up by wishing for a pair of rocket boots for him. He is stoked! Then, a party princess arrives, but this is no ordinary party princess, its VICKY from the original series. Meanwhile, Cosmo, Wanda, and Peri stumble into a secret room, where they discover that Dale has been investigating Hazel since Founders Day. Back at the party, Vicky, rotten as ever, forces the kids to make crafts for her online store instead of having fun. Hazel comes up with a plan full of zany traps to stop Vicky and take the party back! When Dev discovers his dad has been researching Hazel instead of spending time with him, Dev lashes out at Hazel and wishes Peri away. Left alone with his anger, is there a devious plan hatching in Devs mind?

Spongebob has a very energetic and optimistic character and works as a chef in restaurant "The Krusty Krab" where he makes the best burgers of the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: "HALF-HOUR SUMMER VACATION SPECIAL The penguins worst nightmare has come true. After a sailing trip gone wrong they wind up in the Hoboken Zoo. Strangely, the animals are happy, the zoo is a paradise, and life couldnt be better! Zookeeper Frances takes outstanding care of all of them or does she? Something sinister bubbles under the surface the happy animals are actually androids, and the real animals are held captive in a dungeon. Theyre too messy and Zookeeper Frances cant stand a mess! A rescue comes from a very unlikely source, and the final battle could go either way!"

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: "Pets Peeved: The notorious Vesuvius Twins have adopted Skipper and King Julien and brought the animals home to their luxury apartment. Not to spoil and pamper - but to fight each other over shiny baubles! The rest of the penguins and lemurs attempt a rescue but are captured themselves and made to perform in a painful "circus" the twins put together. The tables are going to need to be turned to get this circus out of town. Byte-Sized: Kowalski has another breakthrough invention, tiny robots that group together and not only fix broken tools and appliances, but run them as well. The penguins can just sit back and let the "Nanites" take care of all their chores! The problem is, the Nanites are programmed to protect the penguins at all costs, and ultimately seal the birds inside their lair. The only way to escape is to do battle with a giant, nasty, Nanite robot."

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Deep down in the Pacific Ocean in the subterranean city of Bikini Bottom lives a square yellow sponge named SpongeBob SquarePants. SpongeBob lives in a pineapple with his pet snail, Gary, loves his job as a fry cook at the Krusty Krab, and has a knack for getting into all kinds of trouble without really trying. When hes not getting on the nerves of his cranky next door neighbor Squidward, SpongeBob can usually be found smack in the middle of all sorts of strange situations with his best buddy, the simple yet lovable starfish, Patrick, or his thrill-seeking surfer-girl squirrel pal, Sandy Cheeks.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Accidents Will Happen: When Squidward gets hurt on the job, he threatens to take legal action unless Mr. Krabs agrees to cater to him hand and foot. Mr. Krabs and Plankton find a common enemy in the popular new "Flabby Patty" restaurant. Drive Thru: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall of the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Welcome to the Patrick Star Show hosted by Patrick himself and revolving around his extraordinary family and his own bizzare fantasies. Get to know his family, his Dad Cecil Star, his Mom Bunny Star, his sister Squidina Star, and GrandPat Star, and find out where his charm and eccentricity come from.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: When Leonardo finds himself the accidental hero in a subway station, saving the lives of innocent bystanders, hes thrilled by the title of HERO. This pushes him to a life of crime-fighting vigilantism, starting with putting the Purple Dragons in their place. But when hes caught on camera and his brothers and April see this Turtle-shaped hero on the news, they interrogate him: whats he up to... and can they get in on it? Now, the four Night Ninjas and April suit up and set out to rid the streets of crime in a single night. Now whats left to do? April finds a dog-napping ring thats been snatching up purebreds. Baiting the dog-nappers with a fancy pooch, the Turtles track the criminals and meet the villainous French florist known as... La Fleur! She and her band of hench-florists are using the dog-napping as a cover-up for a much larger crime. And when the Night Ninjas show up to stop her, it may be too late for Leo and his brothers as the whole thing goes up in flames... literally.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Takes us on a roller coaster ride of music, laughter and stories geared to entertain The Chipmunks four generations of fans. Presented for the first time in glorious CGI, the series features ground-breaking animation and a new, original Chipmunk song in every episode. The series is an animated version of a prime-time sitcom and reflects the trials and tribulations of a single parent, David Seville, trying to raise six hyper-active Chipmunks. Like most parents, Daves patience will be pushed to the limit, forcing him to end most sentences in "ALVINNN!!!"

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester are a pair of hilariously individual twins who live in a weird and wonderful alternate reality where your neighbour could be a pair of disgruntled trousers or your best friend a floating cloud of bottom burp. But, unlike their friends and neighbours, Best and Bester have the unique ability to choose a new body every single day and, in doing so, experience life in a completely different way.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The series Bubble Guppies revolves around the underwater adventures of a group of mermaid-like preschoolers who life in the fictional underwater city of Bubbletucky. The episode starts with a sketch of Molly saying "Hi, its me Molly and its time for-" only to be stopped by Gil doing the subject of the show. When Gil or Molly says "Its time for Bubble Guppies!", the theme song starts. After the theme song, the Little Fish say the episodes name. Something happens when a character goes to school. After that, the school day begins and the Bubble Guppies say "Good morning, Mr. Grouper!". Later, the remaining Guppie tells Mr. Grouper about what happened earlier. He states "Lets think about it," and the characters discuss the topic. The pop song for the episode then begins.One of the Guppies will go to a shop that mostly focuses on the topic. The owner of the shop will asks questions about what he or she needs. Later, Mr. Grouper comes into the shop and says its time for lunch, and the "Lunchtime" song plays. At lunch the characters make a food joke about the subject of the episode. After lunch, another Gil and Molly sketch is shown. The Guppies do something fun which leads Mr. Grouper talking more about the topic, which leads into a dancing song. Mr. Grouper then says its time to go outside, the "Outside" song plays, and the Guppies make up a story about the topic. After this, Gil and Molly do another sketch.The Guppies go on a field trip that focuses on the topic, and the show concludes with the last Gil and Molly sketch and a shorter version of the theme song.

programme.title: Breadwinners
programme.desc: Two ducks with thin legs and round faces, SwaySway and Buhdeuce, are best friends. They fly around the water-based planet Pondgea in a rocket-powered van and deliver fresh bread to its citizens. They often find themselves in awkward and funny situations, and sometimes their workdays are quite dangerous. They find new friends, deal with opponents and have fun, making sure Pondgea always receive fresh bread on time.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: Family-orientated cartoon for kids. Ronnie Anne Santiago, her big brother Bobby and their mum have recently moved to Great Lakes City and are now getting used to life in this busy, and sometimes chaotic, new town. Here in the big city they meet the Casagrandes – their extended family made up of grandparents, aunt, uncle, cousins and their pets. Along with a bunch of friends they all live as one big happy family. Skateboarding Ronnie Anne also starts to explore what their new hometown has to offer. Meanwhile, Bobby helps his grandfather Hector working in the family store where they meet lots of interesting characters from the neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The Fairly OddParents tells us a story of Timmy Turner, a 10-year-old boy in the fictional town of Dimmsdale. Vicky is his babysitter with vicious temper. His parents are completely indifferent to him. His life is very sad and hopeless until his fairy godparents Wanda and Cosmo apperar in the fishbowl and try to fulfill his every wish. Timmys greenness in making his wishes causes troubles and he has to "unwish" them together with his fairy godparents to avoid possible disasters. Enjoy Timmys fantastic adventures in the world of fairies, dragons, unicorns and dwarfs.

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: Nine finally sees the error of his ways, but its too late for an easy clean up. Saving the Shatterverse now will require an unthinkable sacrifice, but Sonic is determined to save all his friends, including Nine - no matter the cost.

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: While engaging in a fight with his nemesis, Dr. Eggman, Sonic the Hedgehog destroys the Paradox Prism, an ancient artifact with immense power. This causes a ripple in the space-time continuum, separating Sonic from his friends and sending him to New Yoke City, a dystopian version of Green Hills in a parallel universe ruled by five Eggman variants. Traveling through his new surroundings, Sonic is confronted by Nine, a variant of his best friend Tails who constructed mechanized tails as weapons against his childhood bullies, not having a Sonic to help him. Sonic earns Nines trust, and the young genius modifies Sonics shoes and gloves to attune to the new energy in his body from the Prism. However, Sonic and Nine are captured, and Sonic is taken for tests run by Rusty Rose, a variant of Amy Rose turned into a subservient cyborg. When the variants threaten Nine, Sonic overworks his powers, causing him to generate a massive amount of energy. However, he notices what seems to be a hallucination of his rival Shadow the Hedgehog during this surge and flashbacks to an earlier confrontation with him.

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The Penguins of Madagascar is an American animated television series, a spin-off of the Madagascar films. The main characters are penguins-commandoes: Skipper, Rico, Kowalski, and Private. They pretend to be white and fluffy but in reality are fearless adrenaline addicts and a secret spy team on a mission to protect their home in the Central Park Zoo. The penguins often have to deal with problems caused by their zoo lemur neighbors- King Julien XIII, Maurice and Mort. The penguins thwart any attempts of King Julien XIII to wield the sceptre of the Zoo.

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish
programme.desc: When her parents wont let her have french fries for every meal, Hazel wishes for unlimited fries. But Cosmo and Wanda fail to mention that eating so many magical fries would turn her into a potato! For help Cosmo, Wanda, and Hazel pay a visit to Mother Nature, where Hazel accidentally eats the prized "mother potato." Can she reconcile her fry fixation and get back in Mother Natures good graces, or will Hazel have to face her wrath while stuck as a potato forever? // After Hazel and Marcus watch a scary movie Cosmo and Wanda lent them, paranormal incidents happen in the Wells home. Hazel wishes Marcus had a ghost tracking show to investigate. But Hazel, Cosmo, and Wanda learn the ghost is Ghost Pepper, a fairy actress whose spirit was trapped in the video tape. Fearing her capture will reveal fairies existence, Hazel must convince Marcus to have an "exorcism" as a cover to send her back to Fairy World.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish
programme.desc: When Hazel wishes to be 13 so that she can go see a PG-13 movie by herself, Cosmo and Wanda turn her into a teenager. They go the mall and have a blast doing "teenage things" while they wait for the movie. But, as a side effect of her wish, Hazel starts going through the fairy version of puberty: pasta puberty! As she struggles to deal with pesto pimples and mozzarella mood swings, Hazel wishes that Cosmo and Wanda would just get lost! They disappear, leaving Hazel to deal with the zany pasta puberty alone. // Hazel wishes to be a fairy to join Cosmo and Wanda at their Fairy Convention, but since its against Da Rules, she settles on looking like a fairy instead. Once at the con, however, Hazel stumbles into the DMV booth and signs a "Fairy-fication" certificate, turning her into a real fairy! It also brings her anti-fairy into existence, who steals the certificate. Hazel, Cosmo, and Wanda must get the certificate back from her anti-fairy, or Hazel will be stuck as a fairy forever!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish
programme.desc: Hazel, Jasmine, and Winn take an online BFF compatibility test. To their surprise, they fail! Nobody is fazed, except for Hazel, who overthinks the results and wishes that her friends could know exactly whats in her head. Cosmo and Wanda grant the wish, which lands all of them inside Hazels mind. As they go through her mind like a museum, Hazel continues to overthink everything they see. Now, Hazel must overcome her negative thoughts and battle a literal mind worm to get her friends out! // When Hazel wishes she didnt have a gap in her teeth, the Tooth Fairy fills her gap with a talking tooth, Toothica. At first, she seems like a lot of fun, but when Toothica gets Hazel in trouble with her parents and plans a party in Hazels mouth Hazel isnt invited to, Hazel decides she wants her gone! The Tooth Fairy, however, takes Toothicas side and is even set on honoring her at a gala. Hazel must find a way to prove Toothica is no good and get back her gap or be stuck with this rotten tooth forever.

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Private has an arch enemy in the form of Dale the snail. Why does this snail hate Private so much? Its because Private allegedly smashed the little guy, and keeps smashing him albeit accidentally. Even a public apology ends with Dale getting crushed. Sadly, Dale should never have been enemies with Private to begin with - it was a different penguin who did him wrong. // King Julien becomes enamored of a giant toilet the penguins have built. He wants to use it as his new throne, only the toilet is actually a stink bomb the penguins built to trap Dr. Blowhole. Julien accidently gets trapped, bound tightly to the bomb, so the penguins must try to stop it from detonating, all while going on a wild truck chase through New York. They end up in a New Jersey dump, and Skipper must show a sensitive side before all is lost.

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: "The Most Dangerous Game Night:Marlene plans a game night to help the zoo animals bond but it takes a terrible turn when the snacks run out. While Kowalski, Maurice, and Mort go on a snack run the gaming animals begin to fight over the games - cheating, sore losing, unwilling participation… chaos! The snack runners get trapped by the law at the store, and the zoo animals have to reconcile quickly in order to pull off a risky rescue. This isnt the kind of bonding Marlene had in mind! Street Smarts: Elmer the dog wants a friend, and thinks he found one in Mort. The penguins are compelled to rescue him, but Elmer doesnt want to give the little lemur up! Max the cat is recruited to help, and Max uses his dog expertise to lead the boys to the giant dog. Mort is rescued, but at what cost? The penguins think Max has met his slobbery doom in the jaws of the giant mastiff."

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Deep down in the Pacific Ocean in the subterranean city of Bikini Bottom lives a square yellow sponge named SpongeBob SquarePants. SpongeBob lives in a pineapple with his pet snail, Gary, loves his job as a fry cook at the Krusty Krab, and has a knack for getting into all kinds of trouble without really trying. When hes not getting on the nerves of his cranky next door neighbor Squidward, SpongeBob can usually be found smack in the middle of all sorts of strange situations with his best buddy, the simple yet lovable starfish, Patrick, or his thrill-seeking surfer-girl squirrel pal, Sandy Cheeks.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leo, Raph, Donnie and Mikey emerge from the sewers to face challenges alongside April ONeil like never before. When trouble oozes into the streets of New York City, the team finds themselves up against Mechazoids, street gangs, and even the storm of the century! No matter the obstacle, these heroes in a half shell are ready for action with heart and a whole lot of humor.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Welcome to the Patrick Star Show hosted by Patrick himself and revolving around his extraordinary family and his own bizzare fantasies. Get to know his family, his Dad Cecil Star, his Mom Bunny Star, his sister Squidina Star, and GrandPat Star, and find out where his charm and eccentricity come from.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick hires other Patricks to entertain at parties in Too Many Patricks, then in Much Tofu About Nothing, Pat-Thos shares a Hamdonian tale of love and pork products.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Takes us on a roller coaster ride of music, laughter and stories geared to entertain The Chipmunks four generations of fans. Presented for the first time in glorious CGI, the series features ground-breaking animation and a new, original Chipmunk song in every episode. The series is an animated version of a prime-time sitcom and reflects the trials and tribulations of a single parent, David Seville, trying to raise six hyper-active Chipmunks. Like most parents, Daves patience will be pushed to the limit, forcing him to end most sentences in "ALVINNN!!!"

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Nuts to You/The Terror of Madagascar Description : Nuts to You: Fred the Squirrel has hit the jackpot. He stumbles onto a jackpot oak tree which is loaded with acorns (thats tons of money to animal folk). Hes going to need financial advice, and who better to offer sound advice than King Julien? The two enter a partnership looking for ways to spend on the good life. The Red Squirrel has designs on the loot, though, and captures the hapless twosome in order to squeeze the acorns out of them. Will the evil squirrels precisely planned plot pay or get him played? The Terror of Madagascar: A special delivery has come from Madagascar. What is it? A baby Fossa! Everyone is enchanted by the little tyke except King Julien, who sees him as a lemur-devouring predator, and he has the toothmarks on his butt to prove it! Julien formulates a plan to get rid of the adorable little carnivore, but his slithery solution becomes much worse than the problem!

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester are a pair of hilariously individual twins who live in a weird and wonderful alternate reality where your neighbour could be a pair of disgruntled trousers or your best friend a floating cloud of bottom burp. But, unlike their friends and neighbours, Best and Bester have the unique ability to choose a new body every single day and, in doing so, experience life in a completely different way.

programme.title: Ментовские войны. Киев
programme.desc: Главные события сериала разворачиваются в столице до появления Национальной полиции, во время волны резонансных преступлений. За расследование запутанных дел берется лучший оперативник города, нетипичный майор и любимчик женщин Виктор Таран. Объявив войну криминальному миру, он переходит дорогу руководству, влиятельным авторитетам и завистливым коллегам.

programme.title: СуперЖена
programme.desc: Беспрецедентный баттл за титул суперженщины начинается! Каждую неделю 4 обаятельные и привлекательные девушки будут выяснять, кто же из них достоин звания лучшей жены. С понедельника по четверг дамы будут приходить друг к другу в гости, чтобы оценить хозяйственность, саморазвитие и сексуальность конкуренток. Сжульничать и выставить желаемое за действительное им не удастся, ведь за ними будет наблюдать опытный психолог. В пятницу он проведет беседы тет-а-тет и соберет девушек вместе, чтобы расставить все точки над "i".Хитрые манипуляторши, ведические жены, роковые соблазнительницы, яжматери и боевые подруги… Каждая женщина убеждена, что именно ее модель поведения самая правильная. Но кто же из них может покорить не только сердце своего мужчины, но и впечатлить конкуренток?

programme.title: Папа попал
programme.desc: Вас приветствует самое весёлое семейное телешоу "Папа попал". По правилам проекта участником шоу может стать абсолютно любой мужчина, у которого есть уставшая от жизни и бытовых проблем жена, а также минимум двое детей. В то время, как супруга уезжает отдыхать на далёкий и красивый курорт, ее муж начинает принимать на себя все обязанности своей благоверной. На протяжении 7 дней папа должен будет выполнять абсолютно все задания и поручения, которые обычно выполняет его жена. Уборка, стирка, поход за покупками, воспитание детей и поддержание уюта в доме - всё это теперь ляжет на сильные плечи украинских пап. Более того, участники шоу должны будут сделать еще и множество чисто мужских работ, которые долгие годы их просили выполнить их супруги. Починить забор, поклеить обои, отремонтировать автомобиль или научить ребёнка танцевать - всё это также ляжет на плечи наших мужчин-участников. Папа может? Посмотрим!

programme.title: Свадьба вслепую
programme.desc: Право быть счастливым имеет каждый. Но не каждый может осуществить его. "Свадьба вслепую" - это уникальный украинский социальный проект, который поможет разбитым сердцам создать новую крепкую семью. Однако его создатели сразу предупреждают о том, что даже у самой идеальной пары на проекте не всегда гарантирован успех в развитии отношений друг с другом.

programme.title: На троих
programme.desc: Юмористическое скетч-шоу "На троих" - это зажигательные шутки и забавные истории, которые подсказывает сама жизнь. Персонажи "На троих" хорошо знакомы зрителям - это обычные врачи, гаишники, полицейские, офисный "планктон". Новые серии и десятки комических историй - в проекте "На троих" от актеров "Дизель Шоу"!

programme.title: Особенности национальной работы
programme.desc: Два отчаянных ведущих отравляются за границу, но не путешествовать, а работать. Причем происходить все будет не в ближнем зарубежье или Европе, а в Азии – в странах с незнакомой культурой, непохожим менталитетом и образом жизни. Им придется осваивать самые экзотические, необычные и порой экстремальные профессии: "парень на прокат", реставратор Великой Китайской стены, мойщик слонов. А еще им придется добывать сахар, мыть слонов, вспахивать рисовые поля – делать то, что ранее они видели только в кино или на экскурсиях. Ведущие не только освоят новые для них профессии, но и узнают, как оплачивается труд в азиатских странах. Страховка, социальный пакет, 13 зарплата, бонусы и премии – все условия работы за рубежом они испытают на себе!

programme.title: Особенности национальной работы
programme.desc: Два отчаянных ведущих отравляются за границу, но не путешествовать, а работать. Причем происходить все будет не в ближнем зарубежье или Европе, а в Азии – в странах с незнакомой культурой, непохожим менталитетом и образом жизни. Ведущие не только освоят новые для них профессии, но и узнают, как оплачивается труд в азиатских странах. Страховка, социальный пакет, 13 зарплата, бонусы и премии – все условия работы за рубежом они испытают на себе!

programme.title: Ментовские войны. Харьков
programme.desc: Продолжение культового сериала на телеканале 2+2 онлайн. Все фанаты криминальных историй смогут увидеть, как будет разворачиваться сюжет в новом городе, с новыми людьми и преступлениями, которые придется раскрывать умным следователем. Особенно трудно им будут даваться дела, в которых замешаны "оборотни в погонах" - сотрудники структур, которые должны защищать граждан, а не наоборот. Телеканал 2+2 онлайн гарантирует, что новый сериал понравится вам еще больше двух предыдущие проекты, действия которых разворачивались в Одессе и Киеве. К тому же, вы сможете испытать свои силы в решение запутанных дел - вдруг, вы поймете, кто именно является преступником, раньше, чем главные герои сериала? Смотрите 2+2 онлайн, и узнайте все первыми!

programme.title: Ментовские войны. Харьков
programme.desc: Продолжение культового сериала на телеканале 2+2 онлайн. Смотрите 2+2 онлайн, и узнайте все первыми!

programme.title: Майор и магия
programme.desc: Офицер ФСО Антон Амосов проявляет принципиальность и ставит на место обнаглевшего чиновника. Над головой майора сгущаются тучи. Из Москвы его переводят в родной город Рязанск — пока буря не уляжется. Здесь ему приходится работать обычным опером в местном РОВД. Первое задание — арестовать аферистку Елену Воробьяшкину. По дороге у подозреваемой открывается дар предвидения — она предотвращает аварию. Вскоре провидица поступает на службу в полицию и своими "озарениями" помогает Амосову раскрывать самые запутанные дела. Детективный дуэт ждут необычные расследования и личная история на фоне колоритных видов российской глубинки.

programme.title: Научи жену рулить
programme.desc: Участниками каждого выпуска реалити-шоу становятся две семейные пары. Герои телешоу "Научи жену рулить" готовы, несмотря на риск, побороться за денежный приз — 65000 рублей. Мужья всего за три дня должны научить своих жен водить автомобиль: в первый день дамы осваивают автодром, во второй день — ездят за рулем по городским улицам, а в последний день автоледи выполняют задания на собственном, семейном авто. Одна из женщин, лучше всех справившаяся с заданиями и сдавшая экзамен автогонщику Валерию Шевелеву, объявляется победительницей.

programme.title: Крепостная
programme.desc: Юная сирота Катерина Вербицкая — очень красивая, умная и образованная девушка. Благодаря ее крестной матери Катю воспитали как барышню благородных кровей. Она знает иностранные языки, играет на фортепиано, рисует и прекрасно понимает, что все это никак не облегчит судьбу рожденной в неволе. Катерина принадлежит самым богатым помещикам в Нежине — Червинским. Девушка существует между двумя мирами — миром крепостных и дворян. И ни в одном из них для нее нет места.

programme.title: Крепостная

programme.title: Дизель-шоу
programme.desc: Каждый выпуск "Дизель-шоу" - это час настоящего народного юмора в исполнении блестящих резидентов шоу. Среди участников "Дизель-шоу" талантливые актеры, известные КВНщики и самобытные шоумены. Вся команда, бесспорно, прекрасно чувствует друг друга, а потому так легко и непринужденно дарит хорошее настроение своим зрителям. Концерты Дизель-шоу давно уже стали желанным событием в каждом городе Украины, а поэтому билеты на такие мероприятия раскупаются мгновенно. Поэтому лучше купить билеты заранее.

Ведущие не только освоят новые для них профессии, но и узнают, как оплачивается труд в азиатских странах. Страховка, социальный пакет, 13 зарплата, бонусы и премии – все условия работы за рубежом они испытают на себе!

Особенно трудно им будут даваться дела, в которых замешаны "оборотни в погонах" - сотрудники структур, которые должны защищать граждан, а не наоборот. programme.title: Майор и магия
programme.desc: Офицер ФСО Антон Амосов проявляет принципиальность и ставит на место обнаглевшего чиновника. Над головой майора сгущаются тучи. Из Москвы его переводят в родной город Рязанск — пока буря не уляжется. Здесь ему приходится работать обычным опером в местном РОВД. Первое задание — арестовать аферистку Елену Воробьяшкину. По дороге у подозреваемой открывается дар предвидения — она предотвращает аварию. Вскоре провидица поступает на службу в полицию и своими "озарениями" помогает Амосову раскрывать самые запутанные дела. Детективный дуэт ждут необычные расследования и личная история на фоне колоритных видов российской глубинки.

programme.title: Майор и магия
programme.desc: Кому понадобилась позорная смерть известного телеведущего Олега Ерохина? Лена утверждает, что к его смерти причастны несколько человек. По результатам экспертизы очевидно, что у него после всех возлияний, употребления наркотиков и переживаний случился инсульт. Но как его труп оказался голым на центральной площади города с размазанной по губам яркой помадой? Группа майора Амосова начинает вести расследование.

programme.title: Научи жену рулить
programme.desc: Участниками каждого выпуска реалити-шоу становятся две семейные пары. Герои телешоу "Научи жену рулить" готовы, несмотря на риск, побороться за денежный приз — 65000 рублей. Мужья всего за три дня должны научить своих жен водить автомобиль: в первый день дамы осваивают автодром, во второй день — ездят за рулем по городским улицам, а в последний день автоледи выполняют задания на собственном, семейном авто. Одна из женщин, лучше всех справившаяся с заданиями и сдавшая экзамен автогонщику Валерию Шевелеву, объявляется победительницей.

programme.title: Папа попал
programme.desc: Вас приветствует самое весёлое семейное телешоу "Папа попал". По правилам проекта участником шоу может стать абсолютно любой мужчина, у которого есть уставшая от жизни и бытовых проблем жена, а также минимум двое детей. В то время, как супруга уезжает отдыхать на далёкий и красивый курорт, ее муж начинает принимать на себя все обязанности своей благоверной. На протяжении 7 дней папа должен будет выполнять абсолютно все задания и поручения, которые обычно выполняет его жена. Уборка, стирка, поход за покупками, воспитание детей и поддержание уюта в доме - всё это теперь ляжет на сильные плечи украинских пап. Более того, участники шоу должны будут сделать еще и множество чисто мужских работ, которые долгие годы их просили выполнить их супруги. Починить забор, поклеить обои, отремонтировать автомобиль или научить ребёнка танцевать - всё это также ляжет на плечи наших мужчин-участников. Папа может? Посмотрим!

programme.title: Крепостная
programme.desc: Юная сирота Катерина Вербицкая — очень красивая, умная и образованная девушка. Благодаря ее крестной матери Катю воспитали как барышню благородных кровей. Она знает иностранные языки, играет на фортепиано, рисует и прекрасно понимает, что все это никак не облегчит судьбу рожденной в неволе. Катерина принадлежит самым богатым помещикам в Нежине — Червинским. Девушка существует между двумя мирами — миром крепостных и дворян. И ни в одном из них для нее нет места.

programme.title: Дизель-шоу
programme.desc: Каждый выпуск "Дизель-шоу" - это час настоящего народного юмора в исполнении блестящих резидентов шоу. Среди участников "Дизель-шоу" талантливые актеры, известные КВНщики и самобытные шоумены. Вся команда, бесспорно, прекрасно чувствует друг друга, а потому так легко и непринужденно дарит хорошее настроение своим зрителям. Концерты Дизель-шоу давно уже стали желанным событием в каждом городе Украины, а поэтому билеты на такие мероприятия раскупаются мгновенно. Поэтому лучше купить билеты заранее.

programme.title: СуперЖена
programme.desc: Беспрецедентный баттл за титул суперженщины начинается! Каждую неделю 4 обаятельные и привлекательные девушки будут выяснять, кто же из них достоин звания лучшей жены. С понедельника по четверг дамы будут приходить друг к другу в гости, чтобы оценить хозяйственность, саморазвитие и сексуальность конкуренток. Сжульничать и выставить желаемое за действительное им не удастся, ведь за ними будет наблюдать опытный психолог. В пятницу он проведет беседы тет-а-тет и соберет девушек вместе, чтобы расставить все точки над "i".Хитрые манипуляторши, ведические жены, роковые соблазнительницы, яжматери и боевые подруги… Каждая женщина убеждена, что именно ее модель поведения самая правильная. Но кто же из них может покорить не только сердце своего мужчины, но и впечатлить конкуренток?

programme.title: Свадьба вслепую
programme.desc: Право быть счастливым имеет каждый. Но не каждый может осуществить его. "Свадьба вслепую" - это уникальный украинский социальный проект, который поможет разбитым сердцам создать новую крепкую семью. Однако его создатели сразу предупреждают о том, что даже у самой идеальной пары на проекте не всегда гарантирован успех в развитии отношений друг с другом.

programme.title: На троих
programme.desc: Юмористическое скетч-шоу "На троих" - это зажигательные шутки и забавные истории, которые подсказывает сама жизнь. Персонажи "На троих" хорошо знакомы зрителям - это обычные врачи, гаишники, полицейские, офисный "планктон". Новые серии и десятки комических историй - в проекте "На троих" от актеров "Дизель Шоу"!

programme.desc: Šajā Numeroloģijas raidījuma "Baigais Numurs" epizodē ciemos ir aktrise un režisore Inga Ungure (iepriekš Inga Tropa) - spēcīga personība ar apziņas skaitli 7, kas simbolizē transformāciju. Ar Ingu mēs daudz runājām par pārmaiņām viņas dzīvē un to, kā pieņemt transformāciju sevī. Skaitlis 7 numeroloģijā ir saistīts ar intuīciju, atzinību, dziļu izaugsmi un transformāciju gan pašam, gan apkārtējiem. Šī bija vērtīga un iedvesmojoša saruna par attiecībām, jauno es un sevis apzināšanos - par to, kā drosmīgi pieņemt pārmaiņas savā dzīvē.

programme.title: Pa priecīgā kartupeļa pēdām
programme.desc: Gundars Bojārs un Gvido Kakliauskas dodas vairāk nekā 20 dienu garā ceļojumā kalnos, lai atrastu dažādos kartupeļus.

programme.title: Pa priecīgā kartupeļa pēdām
programme.desc: Gundars Bojārs un Gvido Kakliauskas dodas vairāk nekā 20 dienu garā ceļojumā kalnos, lai atrastu dažādos kartupeļus.

programme.title: Pa priecīgā kartupeļa pēdām
programme.desc: Gundars Bojārs un Gvido Kakliauskas dodas vairāk nekā 20 dienu garā ceļojumā kalnos, lai atrastu dažādos kartupeļus.

programme.title: Latvijas stāsti
programme.desc: Jēdzienam "rezilience" nav iespējams atrast vienu, precīzu tulkojumu latviešu valodā. Tulkojumos ir lietoti tādi termini kā izturētspēja, dzīvotspēja, dzīvesspēks, noturība, pretestība, sociālā elastība, izdzīvotspēja, pretstāvēšana, atkopšanās pēc negatīviem notikumiem, taču katrs no tiem ietver tikai daļu no reziliences jēdziena. Kopienas centra "Resiliences Avots" darbība ir vērsta uz cilvēka dzīves kvalitātes uzlabošanu, piedāvājot aktivitātes gan individuāli, gan grupās. Savas darbības laikā ir identificētas galvenās mērķa grupas, uz kuru vajadzībām reaģē Kopības centrs. Tie ir pusaudži un jaunieši, pilngadīgas personas - seniori, personas ar invaliditāti, personas, kurām nepieciešama palīdzība, lai iekļautos sabiedrībā.

programme.title: Spried ar Delfi
programme.desc: Katru darba dienu kopā ar dažādu nozaru speciālistiem, kā arī "Delfi" un citu mediju žurnālistiem aicinām skatītājus spriest par kādu aktuālu tematu - politiķu lēmumiem un to sekām, amatpersonu rīcību un tās motīviem, pārmaiņām sabiedrībā un tās virzītām iniciatīvām, pasaulē notiekošo un tā ietekmi uz Latviju, sasniegumiem un zaudējumiem sportā, kultūras personībām un procesiem.

programme.title: Spried ar Delfi
programme.desc: Katru darba dienu kopā ar dažādu nozaru speciālistiem, kā arī "Delfi" un citu mediju žurnālistiem aicinām skatītājus spriest par kādu aktuālu tematu - politiķu lēmumiem un to sekām, amatpersonu rīcību un tās motīviem, pārmaiņām sabiedrībā un tās virzītām iniciatīvām, pasaulē notiekošo un tā ietekmi uz Latviju, sasniegumiem un zaudējumiem sportā, kultūras personībām un procesiem.

programme.title: Spried ar Delfi
programme.desc: Katru darba dienu kopā ar dažādu nozaru speciālistiem, kā arī "Delfi" un citu mediju žurnālistiem aicinām skatītājus spriest par kādu aktuālu tematu - politiķu lēmumiem un to sekām, amatpersonu rīcību un tās motīviem, pārmaiņām sabiedrībā un tās virzītām iniciatīvām, pasaulē notiekošo un tā ietekmi uz Latviju, sasniegumiem un zaudējumiem sportā, kultūras personībām un procesiem.

programme.title: Spried ar Delfi
programme.desc: Katru darba dienu kopā ar dažādu nozaru speciālistiem, kā arī "Delfi" un citu mediju žurnālistiem aicinām skatītājus spriest par kādu aktuālu tematu - politiķu lēmumiem un to sekām, amatpersonu rīcību un tās motīviem, pārmaiņām sabiedrībā un tās virzītām iniciatīvām, pasaulē notiekošo un tā ietekmi uz Latviju, sasniegumiem un zaudējumiem sportā, kultūras personībām un procesiem.

programme.title: Kāpēc
programme.desc: Žurnāliste Alina Lastovska katru nedēļu stundu garā raidījumā piedāvā karstas un aktuālas diskusijas, kā arī analītiskas intervijas, kas palīdz atrast atbildes uz tik dažādajiem "kāpēc", izgaismojot neērtas patiesības, atbildīgo personu patiesās domas un rīcības motīvus, atklājot cēloņsakarības un to, kādas korekcijas nepieciešamas "kursā", lai veicinātu Latvijas izaugsmi.

programme.title: Mājā un sētā
programme.desc: Pavasaris ir klāt, un līdz ar to - arī iedvesmojošais raidījums "Mājā un sētā"! Drīz sāksies dārza darbi, un mēs būsim klāt, lai kopā smeltos idejas, padomus un iedvesmu! Vai vēlies uzlabot savu māju, pagalmu vai dārzu? Mēs dosimies pie saimniekiem, kuri savu ikdienu padara radošu un krāsainu - gan pilsētās, gan laukos! Vēl, dosimies ciemos pie sabiedrībā zināmu personu mīļdzīvniekiem. Parunāsim par to, kā skrienošajā ikdienā apievienot rūpes par mājdzīvnieku un gūt iedvesmu jauniem darbiem? Skaties raidījumu "Mājā un sētā", un ļauj pavasara enerģijai ienākt tavā ikdienā - ar darbiem, idejām un prieku!

programme.title: Mēs varam - mēs darām!
programme.desc: Televeikala skatlogs. Iedvesmojies kā hobiju pārvērst par pelnītspējīgu biznesu. Uzzini, kas tuvākā un tālākā apkārtnē atjaunots, uzlabots un pilveidots. Seko līdz, stāstiem ar kuriem varam lepoties un iespējām, kas var būt aktuālas tieši Tev!

programme.title: Tikšanās vieta. Valmieras novads
programme.desc: Vēlies uzzināt kas notiek Valmieras novadā? Šis ir raidījums, kurā par to vari uzzināt visu. Aktualitātes, jaunumi un notikumi.

programme.title: Ekspedīcija pa 37. paralēli
programme.desc: Sākas ceļojuma izaicinošākā daļa - dodamies pārgājienā pa Andu kalniem, lai sastaptu mapuču cilti. Pirmā nakts dabā, pirmais ugunskurs un pirmie pārbaudījumi: kāds tā arī neaizmieg, citam teltī nepietiek vietas, bet vēl kādam izdodas noķert vien nieka stundiņu miega.

programme.title: Ceļot bez robežām
programme.desc: "Ceļot bez robežām" komanda savu piedzīvojumu sāk ar rīta burvību vienā no Slovēnijas iespaidīgākajām vietām - Postojnas alā. Pēc tam ceļš ved uz netālo, klintī ieslēpto Predjamas pili, kur vēsture savijas ar elpu aizraujošiem skatiem. Tālāk komanda dodas gleznainā braucienā apkārt Bledas ezeram, pirms piepilda vienu no saviem mērķiem - ieraudzīt leģendāri dzidro un zaļgano Sočas upi. Nākamais rīts sākas mierīgi ar makšķerēšanu, taču ne viss norit pēc plāna. Arī diena, kurā paredzēta tikšanās ar Saimonu, izvēršas piedzīvojumiem bagāta - viens nepareizs pagrieziens, un kemperis nonāk uz ceļa, kas komandai liek piedzīvot īstu nervu pārbaudījumu. Beidzot satiekot Saimonu, ceļojums iegūst jaunu garšu - burtiskā nozīmē. Visi kopā dodas ciemos pie privāta olīveļļas ražotāja un vietējiem vīndariem, bet dienas noslēgumā top viens no gardākajiem steikiem visa ceļojuma laikā. Nākamajā dienā komanda izbauda mierpilnu velobraucienu cauri gleznainām pilsētiņām, bet vakaru pavada kempingā pie pašas jūras. Slovēnija ir iepazīta - laiks doties tālāk un atklāt Itāliju.

programme.title: Amatas apvienības svētku koncerts "Ar saknēm debesīs"
programme.desc: Koncertā "Ar saknēm debesīs" piedalās Ieva Kerēvica, Andris Ērglis, Gundars Grasbergs, Artis Robežnieks un Anatolija Livča pavadošā grupa.

programme.title: Dieva putniņi
programme.desc: Otrā pasaules kara beigu posmā, kad kļuva skaidrs, ka Latviju atkal ieņems padomju armija, apmēram 150 000 devās bēgļu gaitās uz Vāciju. Tie bija dažādu profesiju pārstāvji – lauksaimnieki, uzņēmēji, bijušie politiķi, valstsvīri, radošā inteliģence, darba cilvēki –, kas jau bija izbaudījuši "baigā gada" nedienas. Gandrīz miljons cilvēku no Austrumeiropas zemēm glābās no padomju režīma. Arī latvieši, kas sevi nometņu laikā sauca par "dīpīšiem", "Dieva putniņiem", centās iekārtot savu dzīves telpu, trimdā veidojot Mazo Latviju. Latviešu ģimenes no nometnēm Vācijā 40. gadu beigās izceļoja uz Lielbritāniju, ASV, Kanādu, Austrāliju. Kad Latvija kļuva brīva, daļa no izceļotājiem atgriezās, lielākā daļa izkaisīta pasaulē. Filmā parādīti 1944. gadā uz Vāciju izceļojošo ģimeņu likteņi.

programme.title: Piedzīvojums dabā
programme.desc: Piedzīvojumu meklētājs Jānis Kļaviņš dodas jaunajā un vēl nezināmajā, izpētot dabu pārgājienos. Cilvēks ir viena no vides sastāvdaļām, kas veido to kopumu. Ar piemēriem vēlamies parādīt, kā cilvēks var, veiksmīgi integrējoties vidē, vadīt savu saimniecisko darbību. Veidot cilvēku izpratni, dodoties Latvijas dabā, izglītojot un informējot iespējami plašu sabiedrības daļu par dažādo ekosistēmu un sniedzot praktiskus padomus, kā izmantot dabas resursus, nepiesārņojot un saglabājot vides kvalitāti.

programme.title: Ventas balss
programme.desc: Raidījums "Ventas Balss" aicina skatītājus doties iedvesmojošā ceļojumā gar Ventas upes krastiem, iepazīstot cilvēkus, kuru dzīve, darbs un stāsti savijušies ar šo apkaimi. Katrā epizodē satiksim interesantas un daudzveidīgas personības no Ventspils, Ventspils novada un citām Ventas piekrastes vietām - radošus prātus, uzņēmējus, ārstus, sportistus, skolotājus, amatniekus un vienkārši aizrautīgus dzīves baudītājus. Tā ir iespēja ielūkoties viņu ikdienā, dzirdēt personiskus stāstus un sajust reģiona unikālo garu caur cilvēku pieredzi un skatījumu uz dzīvi.

programme.title: No Piena ceļa nākuši
programme.desc: "No Piena ceļa nākuši: Sēlija - identitāte" piektajā raidījumā viesosimies Birķineļos - Sēlijas ciemā, kas atrodas Augšdaugavas novadā. Apmeklēsim Raiņa māju un uzzināsim vairāk par dižā dzejnieka bērnību un tūrisma iespējām, apskatīsim Birķineļu baznīcu un iezvanīsim lielo baznīcas zvanu.

programme.title: Zaļā gaisma
programme.desc: Auto, drošība uz ceļa, jaunāko noteikumu un likumu skaidrojumi. Raidījumā pastāstīsim par jaunākajām aktualitātēm, kas jāzina un jāņem vērā katram autovadītājam.

programme.title: Ēdienkarte
programme.desc: Ceļojums pa Latviju un tās garšām. Jaunas receptes un spilgtas personības.

programme.title: Zini savas tiesības
programme.desc: Darījumi ar nekustamajiem īpašumiem ir zem valsts uzraudzības lupas. Kādi ir krāpniecības riski, kā veikt darījumu, lai izvairītos no apkrāpšanas un nelikumībām. Kā noformēt nekustamā īpašuma darījumu un kāpēc ir svarīgi uzrādīt darījuma patieso cenu.

programme.title: Dziesmavots
programme.desc: Frāze "es nevaru būt balts, un tas nav iespējams" mūsdienu sensitīvajā pasaulē izklausās jau kaut kā nepiedienīgi rasistiski, taču ilggadējie grupas "Tranzīts" fani un hita "Nevaru būt balts" līdzi dziedātāji ļoti labi zina, ka tai ar rasismu nav absolūti nekādas saistības, bet par ko ir runa, skaidros Atis Zviedris! Tāpat uzzināsim kā šodien klājas slavenākajam dziedošajam policistam Nikolajam Puzikovam un aizvedīsim atmiņu stāstījumā ar dziesmu "Dievs Tevi mīl".

programme.title: Dziesmavots
programme.desc: Mums netrūkst Maestro Raimonda Paula retrohitu, taču daži pamanījušies kļūt par mūžīgiem megahitiem. Raidījumā "Dziesmavots" par vienu no spilgtiem piemēriem- "Genoveva" - jestrs un melodisks Žorža Siksnas izpildīts skaņdarbs, kas joprojām liek kustēties un dziedāt līdzi. Savukārt, raidījuma otrajā daļā mūsdienu megahits, kuru radījuši, iespējams, jautrākā Latvijas puišu grupu - "Citi Zēni", skaidrosim kā tapa dziesma "Lieka Štuka!".

programme.title: Nedēļa Latvijā
programme.desc: Par aizvadītās nedēļas svarīgākajiem notikumiem Latvijas novados.

programme.title: Armanda Birkena atvadu koncerts Dzintaru Koncertzālē
programme.desc: 2025.gada vasarā Dzintaru koncertzāli piepildīja īpaša un sirsnīga atmosfēra - izskanēja leģendārā "Čikāgas piecīšu" mūziķa Armanda Birkena atvadu koncerts, kas kļuva par viņa emocionālu un nozīmīgu šķiršanos no skatuves. Klausītājiem tā bija unikāla iespēja pēdējo reizi baudīt mākslinieka dziedājumu un klātbūtni, kas gadu desmitiem iemantojusi viņu mīlestību. Vakara gaitā skanēja dziesmas, kuras Birkens bija izvēlējies kā savas dzīves īpaši nozīmīgos skaņdarbus - patriotiskas un romantiskas melodijas, jautri priekšnesumi un dziesmas par Latviju. Mākslinieks dalījās ar sajūtām par šo emocionālo dzīves posmu, uzsverot, cik svarīga viņam ir satikšanās ar klausītājiem un iespēja vēl vienu reizi būt uz skatuves. Koncertu kuplināja vairāki īpašie viesi - Armanda ilggadējā skatuves partnere Lorija Vuda-Cinkusa, Ieva Akuratere, akordeonists Rolands Zelčs no "Hāgenskalna muzikantiem", bērnu popgrupa "Karameles" un citi draugi. Kopā radīts siltuma un pateicības pilns vakars, kas kļuva par skaistu atvadu brīdi gan māksliniekam, gan viņa uzticīgajiem klausītājiem.

programme.title: Rezervēts
programme.desc: Liene Dambiņa. Viņas dzīvi izmainīja notikums - no gultiņas izkrita pašas mazulis. Viņai ir četri bērni, bet patiesībā to ir tūkstošiem. Kad pazūd zeme un jēga ir tikai dzīvībai - viņa ar komandu dara teju visu, lai uzvara būtu. Astoņus miljonus caur ziedotājiem ir atnesusi uz bērnu fondu. Plosa sevi, rakstot ģimenēm - piedodiet, mēs darījām visu, bet… Un jau nākamajā mirklī cīnās par citiem. Paškritiska, noslēgta un tā, kas bēg no pūļiem. Viņai nepatīk uzstāties un runāt par sevi. Politiķi ir flirtējuši un mēģinājuši ievilkt savās rindās. "Kāda jēga no manis sabiedrībai būtu tur?" Iespējams, tad tautai būtu Latvijas prezidente sieviete. Rezervēts - par cilvēcību un līdzcietību - Liene Dambiņa.

programme.title: Rezervēts
programme.desc: Viņa pati par sevi saka - esmu nīstākā žurnāliste Latvijā. Taisnības cīnītāja un mamma, kuras laime ir brīvdienu rīti, ar bērniem, gultā dauzoties. Viņai ir skaļa mute un dumpīgs raksturs. Tas vairāk sitis nekā devis. Karjerai ziedojusi sevi, tuvākos, bet neapzināti vienmēr pierādījusi tiem, kas teikuši - tu būsi nekas. Viņa redz no tāluma, cik ļoti cilvēki baidās no viņas. Tā ir vara. Viņa noslīgst tviterī un darbā. Taču patiesībā viņa mācās būt laimīga un baudīt - te un tagad. Rezervēts. Inga Sprinģe.

programme.title: Izšķirtspēja
programme.desc: Latvieši jokot māk, bet vēl labāk par jokošanu prot novērtēt tiešām labu humora izjūtu un asprātīgas karikatūras. Kā izskatās smieklus izraisošu bilžu radīšanas virtuvē, cik būtiski ir atrast lielisku ideju, izmantot vārdu spēles, no kādām tēmām jāizvairās, paļaujoties uz iekšējo cenzoru, lai nenokļūtu divdomīgās situācijās, stāsta mākslinieks karikatūrists Gatis Šļūka.

programme.title: Latvijas stāsti

programme.title: Pa priecīgā kartupeļa pēdām
programme.desc: Gundars Bojārs un Gvido Kakliauskas dodas vairāk nekā 20 dienu garā ceļojumā kalnos, lai atrastu dažādos kartupeļus.

programme.title: Baigais numurs
programme.desc: Šajā Numeroloģijas raidījuma "Baigais Numurs" epizodē ciemos ir aktrise un režisore Inga Ungure (iepriekš Inga Tropa) - spēcīga personība ar apziņas skaitli 7, kas simbolizē transformāciju. Ar Ingu mēs daudz runājām par pārmaiņām viņas dzīvē un to, kā pieņemt transformāciju sevī. Skaitlis 7 numeroloģijā ir saistīts ar intuīciju, atzinību, dziļu izaugsmi un transformāciju gan pašam, gan apkārtējiem. Šī bija vērtīga un iedvesmojoša saruna par attiecībām, jauno es un sevis apzināšanos - par to, kā drosmīgi pieņemt pārmaiņas savā dzīvē.
